description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 52 mins of coding time, averaging 2 hrs 14 mins per day. His time was mostly in Java and Markdown, with some work in other languages. The JSON does not list any public GitHub repositories, commits, pull requests, or new repos for this week.
